column1: Top ten markets versus main last departure airports
and main airlines to Sri Lanka
The  data  reveals  that  tourists  coming  to  Sri  Lanka  exhibit  variations  in  their  preferred
airlines and  last  departure  airports,  depending on  their  primary  markets.  For  instance,
Indian tourists  commonly  choose  Sri  Lankan  Airlines  and IndiGo,  whereas  Russian
tourists tend to favour Red Wings and Aeroflot. In comparison, Sri Lankan Airlines is  a
popular choice among tourists from countries like India, Maldives, Canada,Australia  and
China.  It  is  worth  noting  that  German  tourists  and  tourists  from  Netherland  frequently
choose  Qatar  Airways  and  utilize  Doha  as their  primary last  departure  airport.This
highlights  the crucial role of destination accessibility in promoting tourism.
